title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at CGI India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at CGI India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? CGI India Capital India in Ahmedabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CGI India Capital India:
CGI India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CGI India Capital India!
